risk_title: Political instability delaying legislative approval of critical PFM reforms
risk_summary: Implementation and large-scale capacity building for new public procurement regulations is stalled awaiting final approval by the National Legislative Assembly, indicating political governance constraints affecting project execution.
evidence_quote: Implementation and large-scale capacity building for the new public procurement regulations is awaiting their final approval by the National Legislative Assembly.

risk_title: Fiscal constraints causing salary arrears affecting government operations
risk_summary: Central government salary arrears have worsened from 4 months to 9 months due to fiscal constraints, undermining government capacity and potentially affecting staff morale and institutional stability.
evidence_quote: Due to fiscal constraints, new salary arrears of 9 months reported.

risk_title: Electoral disruptions affecting budget submission timelines
risk_summary: Elections planned for 2023 with delays in constituting Assembly and committees are expected to impact budget submission timelines, as evidenced by the FY23/24 budget submission being 36 days late.
evidence_quote: Elections are planned for 2023 and delays in constituting Assembly and committees are expected. The FY23/24 budget was submitted to the National Assembly on June 20th (36 days delay).
